purpose: Q2 2026 earnings estimate with GAAP opex and normalized adjusted EBITDA-style opex.
adjustedEbitdaCaveat: Adjusted EBITDA is a company-definition proxy, not a GAAP substitute. Gemini's official reconciliation excludes SBC, restructuring charges, D&A, interest, tax, impairment, certain non-recurring legal costs, and other fair-value/noise items.

q1ExpenseNormalizationMillions.interpretation: SBC and restructuring make Q1 noisy, but SBC should not be treated as fully one-time. Show both GAAP and adjusted views.

onchainCrossCheck.interpretation: On-chain addresses do not support a hidden Q2 trading-volume acceleration. Partial Q3 flow is higher and worth monitoring for July/Q3 momentum, but it is post-quarter custody/liquidity activity, not full revenue tape.

analystConclusion: Stripping Q1 noise improves the optics but does not make GEMI a fundamental earnings long by itself. Q2 likely remains a large loss quarter. Bull case depends on prediction-market KPI acceleration, cost actions, and forward commentary.
